text:
Market today: A cautious mood prevails. Rising oil prices and escalating geopolitical tensions are creating broad market headwinds. More directly for your book, there are explicit warnings about AI stocks echoing past bubbles and concerns over chip export controls.

Your holdings: SOXL (-36.74%) and SPAL (-55.27%) are deep in the red and leveraged, demanding immediate attention due to their decay and amplified drops on margin. QQQ (-1.3%) and QQQI (-3.67%) also show TRIM signals.

Watch: Keep a close eye on any further developments regarding AI chip export controls and the broader market's reaction to rising oil prices and AI stock warnings.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing risk in your leveraged, deeply underwater positions given market warnings and macro headwinds.
plays: SOXL: Consider exiting this leveraged position at its current price (160.99) to prevent further decay and capital erosion.
SPAL: Review this new, highly leveraged position (11.25) given its deep loss (-55.27%) and inherent decay.
QQQ/QQQI: Trim these positions to reduce overall tech exposure, especially with the JPMorgan warning on AI stocks.
